mainEntity.name: What does the Global Quantum & AI Award cost to enter?

acceptedAnswer.text: International category entry is $1,000 (SME tier $500 for emerging markets). The full entity quantum-readiness assessment is $5,000 per the IQCDL pricing scheme. See the full booklet at https://iqcdl.org/pricing.

mainEntity.name: When and where is the next ceremony?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Phase 5 Grand Ceremony of the 2027 Global Cycle takes place in November 2027 in Dubai. The next major cycle is the 2029 Global Mega Edition with the theme "AI Beyond Humanity".

SMEs, government entities, accelerators and partner organisations worldwide. Categories include Best Idea, Best Initiative, Best Accelerator, Best Green Quantum-AI Idea, Best Government Programme and the International Open Category.

mainEntity.name: Where do the award proceeds go?

acceptedAnswer.text: 100% of award proceeds advance the UN Sustainable Development Goals and support quantum-capability building in resource-constrained regions.
